name: codex-telegram-gateway
description: Telegram forum-topic gateway for the real Codex CLI runtime.

scripts.smoke: bash -lc 'systemctl --user is-active --quiet codex-telegram-gateway.service && { echo "codex-telegram-gateway.service is active; refuse smoke run to avoid Telegram poll conflict" >&2; exit 1; } || true; TELEGRAM_POLL_TIMEOUT_SECS=1 RUN_ONCE=1 node src/cli/run.js'
scripts.smoke:omni: bash -lc 'systemctl --user is-active --quiet codex-telegram-gateway-omni.service && { echo "codex-telegram-gateway-omni.service is active; refuse smoke run to avoid Telegram poll conflict" >&2; exit 1; } || true; TELEGRAM_POLL_TIMEOUT_SECS=1 RUN_ONCE=1 OMNI_SKIP_PENDING_SCAN=1 node src/cli/run-omni.js'
